name: Chicken Thighs with Leeks and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Diced ham or 4 oz Lean bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a bed of the leeks, cut into large dice, including the tender greens.
2. Add sliced garlic to the leeks.
3. Pour in apple juice, white wine, and brandy (if using).
4. Arrange chicken thighs on top of the leek mixture along with diced ham or bacon.
5. Place the dish in an oven-safe container and bake uncovered for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, or until the chicken is tender.
6. Once done, remove from the oven and pour off any remaining liquid while skimming away any fat.
7. Reduce the sauce by simmering until it thickens into an intensely flavored liquid.
8. Stir in heavy cream, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve and enjoy with a glass of dry cider or sparkling wine.
Serves 4
PER SERVING: 400 calories, 24 g protein, 20 g carbohydrate, 22 g fat (10 g saturated), 106 mg cholesterol, 454 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
